text: え？　これもドールズ？

ではないけれど、このままにはしておけないわね。
おそらく、どこかに制御装置があるはずよ。
危ないし、壊しちゃおっか。

それでもかまわないけど……。
あなた、意外に大胆ね
What? Did DOLLS do this too?

No... but we had probably better take care of it anyway.
There should be a control unit around here somewhere.
I don't like it. Let's smash it!

Sure, that'll work... My, you're awfully aggressive
today, aren't you?
